_meta.used_by: S-0-3 foundation for S-1 profile-guided + S-2 cost model + S-4 test-gen
_meta.status: initial skeleton — 20 attrs. grows as linter/compiler passes wire up.

pure.purpose: fn has no side effects; same inputs → same output
pure.auto_test: random-input determinism check (same args 10x → same result)
pure.enforcement: parser rejects IO builtins inside @pure body (partially done)

memoize.cost_rule: net win when call_count > 1 AND fn_time > memo_lookup_time (~50ns)
memoize.detect_candidate: runtime profile: repeated args pattern → suggest

lazy.cost_rule: net win when consumer has <100% hit rate

hot.purpose: mark fn as performance-critical — JIT/codegen prioritizes
hot.auto_test: profile: top-10% self-time → valid; else → 오명

parallel.purpose: for-loop body has no cross-iter dependency → parallelizable
parallel.auto_test: serial vs parallel result equality check

fuse.purpose: merge back-to-back ops (matmul+add, etc.) into single kernel
fuse.detect_candidate: AST sequence of independent ops on same tensor

specialize.purpose: generate per-type copies (monomorphization) for hot call sites
specialize.cost_rule: call_count >= 3 distinct types; skip if 1 dominant type

retry.purpose: retry on failure up to N times (default 3)

fallback.purpose: catch errors, return void on failure

track.purpose: record all calls for later analysis

deprecated.purpose: warn on call — API planned for removal

optimize.purpose: AST rewrite hint — e.g. bubble→merge, linear→binary

approximate.purpose: fast math — allow fp reassociation, lower-precision intrinsics

profile.purpose: emit timing events — feeds S-1 runtime feedback

quantize.purpose: int8/int4 weight representation — error floor per memory quantization_error_floor.md

next_work: S-0: wire enforcement fields into ai_native_lint.hexa
S-1: profile category attrs feed runtime dump
S-2: performance category attrs + cost_rule feed cost model
S-3: rewrite category attrs enable semantic IR passes
S-4: auto_test field generates property tests
